sentiment_score_definition: x <= -0.35: Bearish; -0.35 < x <= -0.15: Somewhat-Bearish; -0.15 < x < 0.15: Neutral; 0.15 <= x < 0.35: Somewhat_Bullish; x >= 0.35: Bullish
relevance_score_definition: 0 < x <= 1, with a higher score indicating higher relevance.

feed.title: ProShares Trust ProShares UltraShort Bitcoin ETF (NYSE: SBIT) - Share Price

feed.title: Rapid7 outlines $835M–$843M 2026 revenue guidance as AI-driven security investments continue
feed.summary: Rapid7 has provided revenue guidance for 2026, projecting between $835 million and $843 million, driven by continued investments in AI-driven security solutions. This outlook reflects the company's anticipated growth in the cybersecurity sector, emphasizing the increasing reliance on advanced technologies for threat detection and response.

feed.title: Director slate, auditor vote at GD Culture Group (NASDAQ: GDC)
feed.summary: GD Culture Group (NASDAQ: GDC) will hold its 2026 annual shareholder meeting on March 30, 2026, to vote on the election of five directors, the ratification of GGF CPA LTD as the independent auditor for the 2025 and 2026 fiscal years, and the approval of meeting adjournment if needed. The Board recommends voting "FOR" all proposals. Key leadership members like CEO Xiao Jian Wang and CFO Zihao Zhao received modest cash compensation in 2024, with prior auditor HTL International, LLC billing $180,000 for 2024 audit services.

feed.title: Goldman Sachs Invests $42.5M in GeoWealth
feed.summary: Goldman Sachs has made a $42.5 million minority investment in GeoWealth, a turnkey asset management platform, expanding its Series C financing round. While most of the capital will provide shareholder liquidity, the remaining funds are earmarked for developing its UMA technology, including alternatives, core platform improvements, and AI planning. This investment deepens GeoWealth's relationship with Goldman Sachs, granting Goldman a say in the platform's future strategic developments.

feed.title: For 2026, Netflix is doubling down on original storytelling and comedies
feed.summary: Netflix is shifting its 2026 film strategy to focus heavily on original storytelling and a renewed emphasis on theatrical comedies, rather than sequels and reboots. Despite losing its bid for Warner Bros., the company's film chairman, Dan Lin, stated that Netflix is committed to building or acquiring great original movies. Chief Content Officer Bela Bajaria added that Netflix, as a streaming-first company, is also looking to fill genres like comedy and young adult films that major studios have neglected, while avoiding live musical adaptations where they haven't seen success.

feed.title: Q4 Earnings Outperformers: Hormel Foods (NYSE:HRL) And The Rest Of The Shelf-Stable Food Stocks

The piece also briefly touches on broader market concerns, including the impact of AI and geopolitical risks, and suggests investing in companies with strong fundamentals.

feed.title: Align Tech Stock Jumps After Bullish Wall Street Call
feed.summary: Align Technology (ALGN) shares rose following a bullish call from Barclays, which upgraded the stock from Equal Weight to Overweight and raised its price target to $200. This upgrade was driven by the company's strong international growth prospects and solid financial foundation presented by CFO John Morici at a recent healthcare conference. Investors responded positively to these developments, indicating increased institutional confidence and fueling buying interest.

feed.title: Rocket Lab (RKLB) Stock Rebounds on Record $190M Defense Deal, Clear Street Initiates Buy
feed.summary: Rocket Lab USA (RKLB) stock saw a rebound in pre-market trading after securing a record $190 million contract from the U.S. Department of Defense for hypersonic test flights. This deal, utilizing their HASTE launch vehicle, marks the company's largest launch contract to date and boosts its backlog above $2 billion. Rocket Lab specializes in small orbital rockets and satellite solutions, with HASTE being a modified version of its Electron rocket for hypersonic testing.
